/CAL: 1385 MOTION/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE /SATERM/X: SEALING ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED/CTORD: ELECTRONIC MONITORING IS HEREBY TERMINATED,PURSUANT TO THE DISMISSAL/

/CAL:DEFT MOT FOR FORMAL BAIL HEARING/X:MOTION IS MOOT, DEFENDANT RELEASEDVIA OWN RECOGNIZANCE/X:THE COUT DENIES DEFENSE REQUEST TO RELEASE DEFENDANT FROM GPS CONDITION/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE REQUEST TO MODIFY DEFENDANT'S STATUS AS FOLLOWS:/ACM/X:3 MONTHS INFORMAL DIVERSION IS AS FOLLOWS:IF DEFEDANT HAS NO NEW ARRESTS, NO STAY AWAY VIOLATIONS, AND COMPLIANT WITHELECTRONIC MONITORING, THE PEOPLE WILL DISMISS CASE/CONTD:STATUS OF INFORMAL DIVERSION ON 05-07-20/DOPU:EM COMPLIANCE/CONTD:FOR A DISMISSAL ON 06-17-20/DOP/VD:HEARING ON 04-21-20/

/CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTSHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:HEARING ON 04-21-20 FOR RECEIPT OF PTD ELIGIBILITY REPORT IS CONFIRMED/DOP//PTDIV:04-21-20/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/CAUSE/X:DA WAIVES ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA,/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNT(S) 1 CHARGING 490,2(A)PC-M REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FORANELIGIBILITY REPORT,/PTDIV:04-21-20/DOPU:PTD/

/ACM/X:REPORT TWICE A WEEK IN PERSON WITH EM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS  AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OFRELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTIS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/X:STAY OUT OF MACE'S AT O'FARRELL ST,SF/SAORD/X:PEOPLE SERVED DEFENSE COPIES OF STAY OUT OF ORDER/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF EM/DOP/
/CAL:SHERIFF'S WARRANT AFFIDAVIT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: CASE WAS DISMISSED ON 06-17-20 /
